d.description: Research subsecond crate for Rust HMR. Understand: jump table approach, ThinLink linker, limitations (no struct layout changes). Evaluate fit for motif renderer.
d.title: Investigate subsecond for hot reloading

d.description: Identify which functions should be hot-reloadable. Likely candidates: view render methods, element paint methods. Need stable function signatures.
d.title: Design hot-reloadable render function boundary

d.description: Add subsecond::call() wrappers to playground/buttons examples. Test hot reload of render logic changes. Document limitations.
d.title: Integrate subsecond into motif examples
Optimize hot reload dev profile for faster iteration

d.description: Complete rewrite of TextInput to be a proper interactive text editor with selection, keyboard navigation, mouse interaction, clipboard, undo/redo, and IME support
d.name: text-input-rewrite

d.description: Create the InputState struct with: content (String), selected_range (Range<usize>), selection_reversed (bool), marked_range (Option<Range<usize>>), cursor offset helpers. This is the foundation - stateful model separate from visual element.
d.title: Design InputState struct and core data model

d.description: Use unicode_segmentation crate for proper grapheme cluster handling. Implement previous_boundary() and next_boundary() - essential for correct cursor movement through multi-byte characters and combining marks.
d.title: Implement grapheme boundary navigation

d.description: Implement previous_word_boundary() and next_word_boundary() using unicode_segmentation's unicode_word_indices(). Also word_range_at() for double-click word selection.
d.title: Implement word boundary navigation

d.description: Implement find_line_start() and find_line_end() for Home/End key behavior. Handle edge cases: cursor at line start, cursor at document end, empty lines.
d.title: Implement line boundary navigation

d.description: Core cursor movement primitives: move_to(offset) collapses selection to position, select_to(offset) extends selection. Handle selection_reversed correctly when extending in either direction.
d.title: Implement move_to and select_to helpers

d.description: left(), right() actions: move one grapheme, or collapse selection if one exists. Bind to Left/Right arrow keys.
d.title: Implement basic cursor movement actions

d.description: word_left(), word_right() actions: move to previous/next word boundary. Bind to Alt+Left/Right (macOS) or Ctrl+Left/Right (other).
d.title: Implement word-level cursor movement

d.description: home(), end() actions: move to start/end of current line. Bind to Home/End keys, plus Cmd+Left/Right on macOS.
d.title: Implement line-level cursor movement

d.description: move_to_beginning(), move_to_end() actions: move to start/end of entire content. Bind to Cmd+Up/Down (macOS) or Ctrl+Home/End.
d.title: Implement document-level cursor movement

d.description: select_left(), select_right() actions: extend selection by one grapheme. Bind to Shift+Left/Right. Handle selection reversal correctly.
d.title: Implement selection extension actions (character level)

d.description: select_word_left(), select_word_right() actions: extend selection by one word. Bind to Alt+Shift+Left/Right (macOS) or Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right.
d.title: Implement selection extension actions (word level)

d.description: select_to_beginning(), select_to_end(), select_all() actions. Bind to Cmd+Shift+Up/Down (macOS) or Ctrl+Shift+Home/End, and Cmd+A/Ctrl+A.
d.title: Implement selection extension actions (document level)

d.description: Core text manipulation: insert_text() at cursor or replace selection. replace_text_in_range() for IME and programmatic edits. Handle marked_range for IME composition.
d.title: Implement insert_text and replace_text_in_range

d.description: backspace(): delete selection or previous grapheme. delete(): delete selection or next grapheme. Bind to Backspace/Delete keys.
d.title: Implement backspace and delete actions

d.description: delete_word_left(), delete_word_right(): delete to previous/next word boundary. Bind to Alt+Backspace/Delete (macOS) or Ctrl+Backspace/Delete.
d.title: Implement word deletion actions

d.description: delete_to_beginning_of_line(), delete_to_end_of_line(): delete to line start/end. Bind to Cmd+Backspace/Ctrl+K (macOS) or Ctrl+Shift+Backspace/Delete.
d.title: Implement line deletion actions

d.description: copy(): copy selection to clipboard. cut(): copy selection and delete. paste(): insert clipboard content. Handle single-line mode (strip newlines on paste).
d.title: Implement clipboard operations

d.description: Use HistoryEntry struct storing range + old_text + new_text_len. push_undo_patch() before edits. undo()/redo() apply patches. Group consecutive edits within time window. Max history limit.
d.title: Implement undo/redo with patch-based history

d.description: Convert Point<Pixels> to byte offset. For single-line: use text layout width. For multi-line: find visual line, then index within that line. Need layout infrastructure first.
d.title: Implement index_for_position for click-to-cursor

d.description: Single click: position cursor (or extend selection with Shift). Track click position for double/triple click detection within threshold.
d.title: Implement on_mouse_down with click counting

d.description: On double-click: use word_range_at() to select entire word. Track click_count state.
d.title: Implement double-click word selection

d.description: On triple-click: select entire line including trailing newline. Use find_line_start/end.
d.title: Implement triple-click line selection

d.description: on_mouse_move() during drag: extend selection to current position. is_selecting flag set on mouse_down, cleared on mouse_up.
d.title: Implement drag-to-select

d.description: CursorBlink struct with timer-based toggle. visible flag, enable/disable methods. pause_blinking() during typing for immediate feedback. Resume after interval.
d.title: Implement cursor blinking

d.description: scroll_offset tracking. scroll_to_cursor_horizontal() keeps cursor visible with padding. Clamp scroll_offset to valid range.
d.title: Implement horizontal scrolling for single-line input

d.description: Render selection background quad behind text. Handle selection spanning multiple lines. Use selection color from theme/styling.
d.title: Implement selection highlighting in paint

d.description: position_for_index(): get pixel position for byte offset. Use text layout to measure width up to cursor. Account for scroll offset.
d.title: Implement cursor position calculation for rendering

d.description: offset_to_utf16(), offset_from_utf16(), range_to_utf16(), range_from_utf16(). Cache utf16_len for performance. IME APIs use UTF-16.
d.title: Implement UTF-8/UTF-16 offset conversion

d.description: Trait for OS text input protocol: text_for_range, selected_text_range, marked_text_range, unmark_text, replace_text_in_range, replace_and_mark_text_in_range, bounds_for_range, character_index_for_point.
d.title: Implement InputHandler trait

d.description: Render underline or distinct style for marked_range during IME composition. Show composition window positioning via bounds_for_range.
d.title: Implement marked text (IME composition) visual

d.description: actions! macro for defining input actions. InputBindings struct with platform-specific defaults. bind_input_keys() to register. Support custom bindings and unbinding.
d.title: Design key bindings system

d.description: FocusHandle integration. Focus on click. Blur on Escape. Emit Focus/Blur events. cursor_visible() checks focus state.
d.title: Implement focus handling

d.description: EventEmitter for InputStateEvent: Focus, Blur, TextChanged, Undo, Redo. Emit at appropriate points. Allow consumers to react.
d.title: Implement event emission

d.description: set_content() resets selection, clears history. content() returns &str. Handle single-line mode (strip newlines). Mark layout dirty.
d.title: Implement set_content and content accessors

d.description: up(), down() for multiline: move to same x-offset on adjacent visual line. For single-line: up=home, down=end. select_up(), select_down() variants.
d.title: Implement vertical cursor movement (up/down)

d.description: scroll_to_cursor_vertical() keeps cursor visible. scroll_offset, available_height tracking. total_content_height() calculation.
d.title: Implement vertical scrolling for multiline

d.description: InputLineLayout struct: text_range, wrapped_line, y_offset, visual_line_count. update_line_layouts() rebuilds on content/width change. needs_layout dirty flag.
d.title: Implement line layout system for multiline

d.description: enter() action: insert newline in multiline mode. No-op or confirm in single-line mode. Handle indentation preservation optionally.
d.title: Implement Enter key for multiline

d.description: tab() action: insert tab character. Consider indent/dedent behavior for multiline with selection.
d.title: Implement Tab key handling

d.description: Separate concerns: TextInput becomes a thin visual element that renders InputState. InputState owns all editing logic. TextInput handles layout constraints and paints.
d.title: Refactor TextInput element to use InputState

d.description: Update playground example to demonstrate new capabilities: typing, selection, clipboard, navigation. Show both single-line and multiline variants.
d.title: Update playground TextInput demo

d.description: Test all boundary navigation, selection extension, text manipulation, undo/redo, UTF-8/UTF-16 conversion. Edge cases: empty content, single char, multi-byte chars, combining marks.
d.title: Write comprehensive tests for InputState
